fields.name: controlId
fields.label: Control ID or Category
fields.description: SOC 2 control ID or category, such as CC6.1, CC7.2, CC6, or security.

fields.name: auditType
fields.label: Audit Type
fields.description: Optional SOC 2 audit type to target.

output.label: Export Format
output.description: Choose the format for the generated SOC 2 evidence checklist.

reportDir.label: Evidence Output Directory
reportDir.description: Optional directory where the SOC 2 evidence checklist should be written.

quiet.label: Quiet output
quiet.description: Suppress progress output while generating the evidence checklist.
